captum
======

# Available modules


The overview below shows which captum installations are available per HPC-UGent Tier-2 cluster, ordered based on software version (new to old).

To start using captum, load one of these modules using a `module load` command like:

```shell
module load captum/0.8.0-foss-2024a-CUDA-12.6.0
```

*(This data was automatically generated on {{modules_last_updated}})*
